latin: Mulier, postquam vir longam orationem de amore habuit, eum interrupuit et dixit: 'iam a verbo salve me cepisti.'

questions.target: Giving a long speech about love
choices: Giving a long speech about love

questions.prompt: What does the woman mean by 'you had me at hello'?
questions.target: She was already convinced from the start
choices: She was already convinced from the start
She wanted him to stop talking

translation: The woman, after the man gave a long speech about love, interrupted him and said: 'You already had me at hello.'
